name: abd-monorepo
description: Advanced Browser Detector — identify the real browser behind a spoofed user-agent

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@qdev-app/abd-core' build && bun run --filter '@qdev-app/abd-react' build && bun run --filter '@abd/cli' build
scripts.tls: bun run --filter '@abd/cli' build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js tls
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run --filter '*' test
